queries.sql: SELECT s.name AS subject_name, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ssc.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS completion_rate_percent FROM student_subject_completion ssc JOIN subjects s ON ssc.subject_id = s.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY completion_rate_percent DESC LIMIT 50
